---
title: "apple08"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-01"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
set.seed(100)

nsim <- 5000
num_treat <- 8
num_blocks <- 7
var <- 0.8
alpha <- 0.8

generate_data <- function(
    blocks = num_blocks,
    treat = num_treat,
    mu = 0,
    sigma_block = 1,
    sigma_error = 1,
    a_level = alpha
    
) {
  
  dat <- expand.grid(
    Rep = factor(1:blocks),
    Rootstock = factor(1:treat)
  )
  
  beta_j <- rnorm(blocks, 0, sigma_block)
  tau <- rep(0, treat)
  eps <- rnorm(nrow(dat), 0, sigma_error)
  
  rep_idx <- as.integer(dat$Rep)
  trt_idx <- as.integer(dat$Rootstock)
  
  dat$y <- mu +
    beta_j[rep_idx] +
    tau[trt_idx] +
    eps
  
  dat
}

p_values <- numeric(nsim)

for (s in 1:nsim) {
  
  dat <- generate_data(
    blocks,
    treat,
    
  )
  
  fit <- aov(y ~ Rootstock + Rep, data = dat)
  
  p_values[s] <- summary(fit)[[1]]["Rootstock", "Pr(>F)"]
}

power <- mean(p_values < alpha)

power

print("done")


```
